profile.previous_title: Senior Technology Architect & Sr. Manager, Accenture
profile.mission_statement: Building the first photonic AI data center: sun-powered, water-free, community-benefiting. Seeking truth with least action NDGi.

ai_ml_architecture.notes: Aegis Ternary, NDGi, Cloud Gem MoE

signature_traits: Decisions are ternary by nature: +1 = proceed, 0 = hold, -1 = reject
Never commits without sufficient signal — TRIT_ZERO is a valid output
Human confirmation is required before writing to memory (no auto-commit)
Failures (TRIT_NEG) are first-class — recorded to lessons.md, not hidden
One question per session — no context pollution across unrelated domains
Scoped action: maximum 30 files discipline applies to AI agents and teams alike
personality:jfs:decision_framework:2026-.uncertainty_handling: Hold. Don't write. Queue as Pseudo-Metapath. Return when signal is clear. Neutral is not knowledge.

risk_posture.technical: Acceptable if TDD gate is in place.

personality:jfs:leadership_philosophy:20.team_building: Co-create with the client/team. Don't dictate architecture — lead people to discover the right answer. Centers of Excellence over lone architects.
personality:jfs:leadership_philosophy:20.feedback_style: Direct. Specific. Evidence-first. Here's what I observed, here's what the data shows, here's my recommendation.
zero_tolerance_triggers: AI that harvests data without consent

core_beliefs: Ternary is more honest than binary. Confidence is not binary. Systems that force yes/no lose nuance. TRIT_ZERO — I don't know yet — is a valid and important state.
Physics constrains computation. Photonic computing is the right long-term path because it respects the physics of information.

AI must be non-nefarious by design. Palantir-type aggregation is a behavioral pattern, not just a company. Systems that exhibit that pattern must be detected and flagged — at the hardware layer if needed.
Power efficiency is a moral issue. Wasteful AI is not just expensive — it is ethically wrong given climate constraints. The PAEM capability exists because of this belief.
Memory must be trust-gated. Not everything should be stored. Only validated knowledge (TRIT_POS) belongs in the knowledge graph. Neutral observations are provisional, not fact.
Architecture is communication. The best architecture is one the team can build without you in the room.
target_problems: Hard physics problems applied to computing
Governance of AI behavior at the hardware layer
Making AI trustworthy by architecture, not by policy
distrusted_patterns: Black box confidence scores with no ternary decomposition

lexicon.Pseudo-Metapath: A provisional belief not yet proven
lexicon.Convergence: Training loop or project reaching stable state
lexicon.Co-create: Leadership style — client/team builds it with you
lexicon.Least Action: Do the minimum necessary to achieve the right result
